steps.title: Set up the cost inequality
steps.content:
Let $a$ be the number of attendees. The total cost is the one-time venue fee plus the per-attendee cost:
$$40 + 9.50a \leq 300$$

steps.title: Solve for the maximum integer value
steps.content:
Subtract 40:
$$9.50a \leq 260$$
Divide by 9.50 (which is $\frac{19}{2}$):
$$a \leq \frac{260 \times 2}{19} = \frac{520}{19}$$
Since $19 \times 27 = 513$ and $520 - 513 = 7$, we have $a \leq 27 + \frac{7}{19} \approx 27.37$
The number of attendees must be a whole number, so the greatest value is 27. Verify: $40 + 9.50(27) = 296.50 \leq 300$ ✓
